title: The 10-Minute Cortisol-Aware Morning
description: A short series concept that swaps high-intensity AM cardio for a 10-minute low-cortisol stack: 4 minutes of mobility, 4 minutes of brisk walking, 2 minutes of short strength bursts. Frame the throughline as 'work with your nervous system, not against it.' Pillar-1 anchor; spin off three weekly variations as separate posts.
hook: Your morning workout might be making cortisol worse, not better.

cta.text: Follow for the next entry in the series

keyMessage: Ten minutes of intentional, low-intensity movement beats thirty minutes of cortisol-spiking cardio for women 40+.
angle: Reframe morning movement around hormonal reality rather than fitness culture.
